description: Example eval cases for the ab-test-eval skill itself

evals.prompt: 帮我测试一下 my-cli-skill 的效果，看看有没有用
evals.expected_output: Should create eval prompts, spawn with/without skill subagents, grade results, and present benchmark summary

evals.prompt: 我刚写了个新 skill，帮我跑个 AB test
evals.expected_output: Should follow the full workflow: define evals, spawn paired subagents, grade assertions, generate benchmark
